title: m-dev-tools org task_index
description: Validation contract for .github/profile/task_index.json — the hand-curated routing layer of the AI-discoverability stack. Maps plain-English user intent to typed-ID references (cmd:, module:, data:, tool:, etc.) inside the m-dev-tools org. Catalog-build merges this file into tools.json at build time, so the merged result also validates against tools.schema.json's task_index $ref (see schema_compat note in tools.schema.json).

schema_compat.description: Compatibility integer. Only bumps on non-additive (breaking) schema changes. Every bump must add a row to profile/schema-changelog.md.

categories.description: Top-level routing categories (workflow / lib / language / infra / history / …). Each category is a map of intent-key → intent-row. Adding a new category is additive and does not bump schema_compat; renaming or removing one does.

typedID.description: Typed catalog identifier. Must match tools.schema.json's typedID grammar. Duplicated here so this file validates standalone.

intent.description: Plain-English description — the routing key. AI agents fuzzy-match user requests against this string.

analogue_go.description: How this maps to Go's toolchain (e.g. `go fmt`).

analogue_rust.description: How this maps to Rust's toolchain (e.g. `cargo fmt`).

analogue_python.description: How this maps to Python's toolchain (e.g. `ruff format`).
